name: Bahu Fort
description: An imposing, ancient rock fort situated on a high plateau overlooking the Tawi river. It houses the deeply revered Bawe Wali Mata temple.
history: Believed to be originally built over 3,000 years ago by Raja Bahulochan. The current structure was rebuilt by the Dogra rulers in the 19th century.
famousFor: Ancient fortification, Bawe Wali Mata temple, Bagh-e-Bahu garden.
